description: Diversified Japanese materials conglomerate operating across three segments: Material (Leona polyamide/nylon 66, Tenac POM, Delpet PMMA, ABS, SB rubber, acrylonitrile, Hipore Li-ion battery separators, coating materials), Homes (construction/housing), and Health Care (pharmaceuticals, medical devices, diagnostics). Supplies engineering plastics (nylon, POM, PMMA) to Nagase Plastics for distribution. In July 2025, transferred its Asahi Kasei Pharma diagnostics reagents business to Nagase, which became Nagase Diagnostics Co., Ltd. Also produces electronic materials for automotive and semiconductor applications.

_externalRelationships.nagaseRelationship: Supplies engineering plastics (Leona nylon, Tenac POM, Delpet PMMA) to Nagase Plastics Co. for distribution to OEM customers. In July 2025, transferred diagnostics business (Asahi Kasei Pharma KK diagnostics division) to Nagase, forming Nagase Diagnostics Co., Ltd.
keyProducts: Delpet PMMA (acrylic resin) — optical-grade engineering plastic
Hipore battery separator — Li-ion battery membrane
ABS and SB rubber — commodity plastics
keyCustomers: Automotive OEMs — nylon parts, housing parts

_metadata.dataSource: Nagase Plastics supplier page, Nagase press releases (Nagase Diagnostics formation Jul 2025), Asahi Kasei IR
_metadata.notes: Added as Nagase (CMP-0058) key supplier. Financial data not included pending dedicated deep research.
